message:
feat(fcp-sdk): expand SDK exports and add schema validation tests

SDK library improvements:
- lib.rs: Expand public exports with additional types and utilities
- prelude.rs: Update prelude with new SDK types for ergonomic imports

Testing:
- sdk_schema_tests.rs: Add comprehensive schema validation tests
  ensuring SDK types conform to expected JSON schemas and API contracts

Testkit:
- supervisor_examples.rs: Minor refinements to supervisor example code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
